name: python3-alabaster
title: python3-alabaster
description:
Alabaster theme for Sphinx
Alabaster is a visually (c)lean, responsive, configurable theme for the
Sphinx documentation system.
.
As of Sphinx 1.3, Alabaster is an install-time dependency of Sphinx and
is selected as the default theme.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-alabaster because Alabaster theme for Sphinx.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-alabaster as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-alabaster with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-alabaster --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Alabaster theme for Sphinx.

Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Alabaster theme for Sphinx

Sphinx documentation system.

usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install alabaster
